lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: the family cat, unnaturaly golden and too fluffy for its own good.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Hey, Goldie.

lines.speaker: goldie
lines.text: Meow.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: You hungry?

lines.speaker: goldie
lines.text: Meeeow.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Suppose not. Father already fed you didnt he?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: What? We dont need you to get fat now do we?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: You fluffy little beast.

lines.speaker: goldie
lines.text: Mrrrp.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: All you do is sleep and look cute.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: You better start providing for the family soon.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Goldie pretends like he doesnt care about your presence

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Naah. I think being cute is enough work for you, huh?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Having to clean yourself all the time and keep your perfect posture.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Youre alright Goldie.

menu_entry.text: Every time I see that cat I cant believe how majestic he is, and that pompous feline knows it. Especially when he sits beneath the window Goldie looks like hes painted gold.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Hey, Garry the golden.

lines.speaker: goldie
lines.text: Meow!

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I know, I know..you dont like that nickname.

lines.speaker: goldie
lines.text: Meow...

lines.speaker: goldie
lines.text: Meow...

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah. Tell me about it.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Not much company around..with father at work and me at school.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Gotta grit your teeth until mom arrives.

lines.speaker: goldie
lines.text: Mrrp.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: the cat looks at the cutting board on the kitchen table like hes seeing something

lines.speaker: goldie
lines.text: Meeeooow.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: What is it? Something on the table?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Hmm..thats weird.

lines.speaker: goldie
lines.text: Meeeoow, meoow, meow.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Oh, now youre all animated huh?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Seems like you only want to be my friend when theres something to be gained.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Goldie does his signature 'innocent little baby' face

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Im not convinced. You better give me something in return for this.

lines.speaker: goldie
lines.text: Mrrp.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Is that a yes?

lines.speaker: goldie
lines.text: Meeeooow.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I take it as a yes.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: you give the treat to Goldie. He eats it seemingly without even chewing

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Damn try not to choke to death..

lines.speaker: goldie
lines.text: Meeeoow, meoow, meow.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Oh, now youre all animated huh?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Seems like you only want to be my friend when theres something to be gained.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Goldie does his signature 'innocent little baby' face

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Well you did show me the hiding spot..

lines.speaker: goldie
lines.text: Mrrp.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Okay, were good.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Lets keep this relationship productive, you know?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: you give the treat to Goldie. He eats it seemingly without even chewing

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: You scratch my back. I scratch yours.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: But like..not literally. Like last time, you little-

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: No scrtching or youre done for.

lines.speaker: goldie
lines.text: Meeeoow.
